title: High resolution seismic waveform generation using denoising diffusion
description: A bespoke diffusion model trained from scratch on real earthquakes, i.e., audio signals, to synthesize realistic, high-frequency seismic waveforms.

title: Causal posterior estimation
description: A new method for simulation-based inference that exploits the conditional independence structure of the posterior programs and encodes it into a new NN architecture.

title: Simulated-Annealing ABC with multiple summary statistics
description: We propose a novel ABC method that works well on high-dimensional parameter and data spaces using Simulated Annealing.

title: Simulation-based Inference with the Python Package sbijax
description: A Python package implementing simulation-based inference and ABC methods in JAX.
